basics.name: Barsha Chaudhary
basics.label: Computer Science Major, BSc
basics.summary: Undergrate senior who builds apps and currently exploring Machine Learning and researching into LLM.

work.name: Seattle, Washington
work.summary: Worked with Meta Engineers to develop an Android application which allows users to buy and sell used books and message other users like Facebook Marketplace.
highlights: Created clone applications in Java such as Flixster, Instagram, and Twitter during Codepath Sessions.
Users can make a post, message other users, comments on posts with inquiries.
Used APIs like Google Books, set up Database, Firebase SDK and external libraries during app development.

work.name: Los Angeles, California
work.summary: Worked with Meta Engineers to develop an Android application which allows users to buy and sell used books and message other users like Facebook Marketplace.
highlights: Developed a comprehensive monitoring dashboard for the Google Drive Restore team enabling real-time visualization of server states, error identification, and process latency assessment.
Utilized Kotlin, SQL, and Java to collect and store data and creation of dashboard from scratch, which helped the team to deeply understand the overall internal state of server.

awards.title: Google HBCU Hackathon 2024
awards.summary: Google HBCU Hackathon 2024 was organized in DC where HBCU from DMV participated. Out of 24 teams, we were able to secure first position. Our project was a applications that could auto-generate playlist based on users mood and prompt using Google Gemini.

awards.title: Google Capacity Scholarship 2022
awards.summary: Google Capacity is awarded to the students who achieve academic excellence along with contribution to the community with the use of knowledge gained in the school

awards.title: HBCU Possibilties Scholar 2022
awards.summary: As a participant of Goldman Sachs Market, I presented a case study on healthy drinks with prospective marketing schemes.

certificates.name: Codepath Course Completion for Intermediate Android Development course

projects.name: Beats Mobile App
projects.summary: A cross-platform mobile app that creates music playlists for the user based on their prompts.
highlights: Developed with ReactNative which could create music playlists based on prompt entered by users.
Utilized Generative AI - Gemini, Google Search API, Youtube API to make the full stack app.
